nasb.text: I spoke to you in your prosperity; But you said, ‘I will not listen!’ This has been your practice from your youth, That you have not obeyed My voice.

esv.text: I spoke to you in your prosperity, but you said, ‘I will not listen.’ This has been your way from your youth, that you have not obeyed my voice.

cnv.text: 你安定的時候，我曾警告過你， 你卻說：‘我不聽！’ 從你幼年以來，你就是這樣， 不聽從我的話。

ccb.text: 在你们兴盛的时候， 我曾警告过你们， 你们却不听。 你们从小就叛逆， 不听我的话。
